verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
verse.verse_2: For that is the one who drives away the orphan
verse.verse_3: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
verse.verse_4: So woe to those who pray
verse.verse_5: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -
verse.verse_6: Those who make show [of their deeds]
